fault_hypothesis: The clamping logic on line 55 is incorrect. When the counter exceeds `max_value`, it is set to `max_value - 1` instead of being clamped to `max_value`.

constraints.intent: The clamped value should be exactly the maximum allowed value.
After clamping because the value exceeded the ceiling, the new value must equal the ceiling.

spec.expr: max_value is None or ((new_value__1 > max_value and new_value__3 == max_value) or (new_value__1 <= max_value and new_value__3 == new_value__1))

constraints.intent: The final value must be correctly clamped to the ceiling if one is provided.
